title.zh: Figma 收购 AI 媒体生成公司 Weavy · Trace.Space 融资加速 AI 产品设计 · 设计工具行业加速 Agent 化
title.en: Figma Acquires AI Media Company Weavy · Trace.Space Raises Seed to Accelerate AI Product Design · Design Tools Go Agentic

content.zh:
📌 今日要闻

  • Figma 收购 AI 媒体生成公司 Weavy — Figma 宣布收购 Weavy，一家专注于 AI 驱动媒体生成的公司。这是 Figma 继去年推出 AI 功能后的又一次重大布局，意味着 Figma 正从「设计协作工具」向「AI 原生设计平台」全面转型。设计师未来在 Figma 中可能直接通过 prompt 生成图片、视频等素材，而非依赖外部工具。
    来源：TechCrunch
  • Trace.Space 完成种子轮融资 — 这家专注于用 AI 加速产品设计的初创公司获得新一轮融资。其核心理念是让 AI agent 参与从用户研究到原型生成的全流程，而非仅仅辅助视觉产出。
    来源：TechCrunch
  • Raspberry AI 获 a16z 领投 2400 万美元 — 聚焦时尚设计领域的 AI 工具，用生成式 AI 加速服装设计迭代。虽然是垂直领域，但反映了一个趋势：AI 设计工具正在按行业细分深耕。
    来源：TechCrunch

🔄 流程与角色变化

  • Cursor 推出新型 agentic coding 工具 — 虽然面向开发者，但对设计师同样有启示：当 coding agent 能自主完成前端实现时，设计师的交付物可能从「标注好的设计稿」变为「可被 agent 理解的设计意图描述」。设计和开发之间的边界正在被 agent 重新定义。
  • Iconfactory 出售部分应用，称 AI 是原因之一 — 老牌设计开发工作室 Iconfactory 正在出售部分 app 产品线，直言 AI 对其商业模式造成了冲击。图标、插画等曾经的核心业务正被 AI 生成工具侵蚀。这是设计行业洗牌的一个缩影。
    来源：TechCrunch

🍎 Apple 设计动态

  • Apple 聘请了知名相机应用 Halide 的联合创始人加入设计团队
  • iOS 26 的 Liquid Glass 设计引发两极评价，beta 3 已开始回调部分效果

🔍 Rex 的看法

Figma 收购 Weavy 是今天最值得关注的信号。

Figma 的野心已经很清楚了——它不想只做「协作白板」，它要做 AI 时代的设计操作系统。收购 Weavy 意味着素材生成能力将内置到设计流程中，设计师的工作重心会进一步从「制作」转向「决策」：你不再需要花时间找图、修图、做素材，而是专注于判断 AI 生成的哪个方案最好、如何调整方向。

但我想提醒一点：当工具把制作门槛降到零，「品味」就成了唯一的护城河。那些靠执行力吃饭的设计师会很难受，而有审美判断力和系统思维的设计师反而会更值钱。这不是未来——Iconfactory 的故事说明这已经在发生了。
content.en:
📌 Top Stories

  • Figma Acquires AI Media Generation Company Weavy — Figma announced the acquisition of Weavy, a company specializing in AI-driven media generation. Following last year's AI feature rollout, this signals Figma's full pivot from "design collaboration tool" to "AI-native design platform." Designers may soon generate images, videos, and assets directly via prompts within Figma, eliminating reliance on external tools.
    Source: TechCrunch
  • Trace.Space Closes Seed Round — This startup focused on accelerating product design with AI has raised a new round. Its core vision: AI agents participating in the entire design process from user research to prototyping, not just visual output.
    Source: TechCrunch
  • Raspberry AI Raises $24M Led by a16z — An AI tool for fashion design, using generative AI to speed up garment design iteration. While vertical, it reflects a broader trend: AI design tools are going deep into industry-specific niches.
    Source: TechCrunch

🔄 Workflow & Role Shifts

  • Cursor Rolls Out New Agentic Coding Tool — Though aimed at developers, the implications for designers are clear: when coding agents can autonomously implement frontends, a designer's deliverable may shift from "annotated mockups" to "design intent descriptions that agents can interpret." The boundary between design and development is being redrawn by agents.
  • Iconfactory Selling Some Apps, Cites AI as a Factor — The veteran design studio is offloading part of its app portfolio, openly stating that AI has disrupted its business model. Icons, illustrations — once core revenue — are being eroded by AI generation tools. A microcosm of the industry shakeup.
    Source: TechCrunch

🍎 Apple Design Notes

  • Apple hires Halide co-founder for its design team
  • iOS 26's Liquid Glass design draws polarized reactions; beta 3 dials back some effects

🔍 Rex's Take

The Figma-Weavy acquisition is today's most important signal.

Figma's ambition is now crystal clear — it doesn't want to be a "collaboration whiteboard," it wants to be the design operating system for the AI era. Acquiring Weavy means asset generation will be baked into the design workflow. Designers' focus will continue shifting from "making" to "deciding": less time sourcing and editing assets, more time judging which AI-generated option works best and steering direction.

But here's the thing: when tools reduce the cost of making to zero, taste becomes the only moat. Designers who relied on execution skills will struggle, while those with aesthetic judgment and systems thinking will become more valuable. This isn't the future — the Iconfactory story shows it's already happening.
